description: VIPSA environment machine status and command logs

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, status AS "Light" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'light' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "Light" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'light' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'light' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'light' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 300) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'response.immediate') AND msg_type = 'response' THEN time + INTERVAL '2 seconds' ELSE time END AS time, CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'queue') THEN 'PUDA: queue response: ' || msg_type WHEN topic IN ('response.immediate', 'immediate') THEN 'PUDA: immediate response: ' || msg_type ELSE 'PUDA: ' || REPLACE(topic, 'response.', '') || ' ' || msg_type END AS "Light" FROM machine_commands WHERE machine_id = 'light' AND msg_type IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Stage" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'stage' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "Stage" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'stage' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'stage' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'stage' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 300) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'response.immediate') AND msg_type = 'response' THEN time + INTERVAL '2 seconds' ELSE time END AS time, CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'queue') THEN 'PUDA: queue response: ' || msg_type WHEN topic IN ('response.immediate', 'immediate') THEN 'PUDA: immediate response: ' || msg_type ELSE 'PUDA: ' || REPLACE(topic, 'response.', '') || ' ' || msg_type END AS "Stage" FROM machine_commands WHERE machine_id = 'stage' AND msg_type IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT time, status AS "Zaber" FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'zaber' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "Zaber" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'zaber' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'zaber' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'zaber' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 300) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'response.immediate') AND msg_type = 'response' THEN time + INTERVAL '2 seconds' ELSE time END AS time, CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'queue') THEN 'PUDA: queue response: ' || msg_type WHEN topic IN ('response.immediate', 'immediate') THEN 'PUDA: immediate response: ' || msg_type ELSE 'PUDA: ' || REPLACE(topic, 'response.', '') || ' ' || msg_type END AS "Zaber" FROM machine_commands WHERE machine_id = 'zaber' AND msg_type IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, 'VIPSA Status: ' || status AS "vipsa" FROM (SELECT time, status FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'vipsa' AND status IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 150) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, event AS "vipsa" FROM (SELECT time, event FROM (SELECT time, 'Session: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_session WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'LLM Turn: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request: ' || event AS event FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call: ' || event || ': ' || tool_name AS event FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 400) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'response.immediate') AND msg_type = 'response' THEN time + INTERVAL '2 seconds' ELSE time END AS time, CASE WHEN topic IN ('response.queue', 'queue') THEN 'PUDA: queue response: ' || msg_type WHEN topic IN ('response.immediate', 'immediate') THEN 'PUDA: immediate response: ' || msg_type ELSE 'PUDA: ' || REPLACE(topic, 'response.', '') || ' ' || msg_type END AS "vipsa" FROM machine_commands WHERE machine_id = 'vipsa' AND msg_type IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time ASC

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agent_id, event, COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(assistant_response AS VARCHAR), ''), NULLIF(CAST(user_message AS VARCHAR), ''), '') AS message FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 32

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, agent_id, event, COALESCE(tool_name, 'tool') AS tool_name, COALESCE(status, '') AS status, COALESCE(CAST(duration_ms AS VARCHAR), 'pending') AS duration_ms, CASE WHEN event = 'tool_end' THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(result AS VARCHAR), ''), NULLIF(CAST(error_message AS VARCHAR), ''), 'No result returned.') ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(args AS VARCHAR), ''), '{}') END AS message FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 48
SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Commands Sent" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'command' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa'
SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Responses" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'response' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa'

SELECT now() AS time, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 END) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS "Success Rate" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'response' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa'
SELECT now() AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Errors" FROM machine_commands WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa'

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, COUNT(*) AS "vipsa" FROM machine_commands WHERE msg_type = 'command' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Errors" FROM machine_commands WHERE status = 'error' AND $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', time, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01 00:00:00Z') AS time, SUM(total_tokens) AS "vipsa" FROM hermes_api_request WHERE event = 'api_end' AND total_tokens IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) AND agent_id = 'vipsa' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT time, agent_id, source, event, message FROM (SELECT time, agent_id, 'Session' AS source, event, '' AS message FROM hermes_session WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, agent_id, 'LLM Turn' AS source, event, COALESCE(NULLIF(substr(CAST(assistant_response AS VARCHAR), 1, 500), ''), NULLIF(substr(CAST(user_message AS VARCHAR), 1, 500), ''), '') AS message FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) UNION ALL SELECT time, agent_id, 'API Request' AS source, event, COALESCE(model, '') AS message FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time)) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT time, agent_id, event, COALESCE(tool_name, 'tool') AS tool_name, COALESCE(status, '') AS status, duration_ms, COALESCE(error_message, '') AS message, COALESCE(substr(CAST(args AS VARCHAR), 1, 700), '{}') AS args FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT time, machine_id, msg_type, COALESCE(cmd_name, '') AS command, status, COALESCE(CAST(step_number AS VARCHAR), '') AS step, username, COALESCE(run_id, '') AS run_id, COALESCE(substr(response_message, 1, 300), '') AS message, COALESCE(substr(params_json, 1, 300), '') AS params, COALESCE(substr(data_json, 1, 1000), '') AS response FROM machine_commands WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND machine_id = 'vipsa' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: VIPSA Event Detail (click a VIPSA timeline event)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, 'Session' AS source, event, agent_id, COALESCE(model, '') AS message, COALESCE(reason, '') AS details FROM hermes_session WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 2000) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'LLM Turn' AS source, event, agent_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(substr(CAST(assistant_response AS VARCHAR), 1, 700), ''), NULLIF(substr(CAST(user_message AS VARCHAR), 1, 700), ''), '') AS message, COALESCE(model, '') AS details FROM hermes_llm_turn WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 2000) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'API Request' AS source, event, agent_id, COALESCE(model, '') AS message, COALESCE(CAST(total_tokens AS VARCHAR), '') AS details FROM hermes_api_request WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 2000) UNION ALL SELECT time, 'Tool Call' AS source, event, agent_id, COALESCE(tool_name, '') AS message, COALESCE(status, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(substr(CAST(error_message AS VARCHAR), 1, 400), '') AS details FROM hermes_tool_call WHERE agent_id = 'vipsa' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 2000) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, 'PUDA Command' AS source, COALESCE(msg_type, '') AS event, machine_id AS agent_id, COALESCE(cmd_name, '') AS message, COALESCE(substr(response_message, 1, 700), '') AS details FROM machine_commands WHERE machine_id = 'vipsa' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 2000) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT time, 'Machine Status' AS source, COALESCE(status, '') AS event, machine_id AS agent_id, COALESCE(status, '') AS message, '' AS details FROM machine_status WHERE machine_id = 'vipsa' AND time >= to_timestamp_millis($event_time - 2000) AND time < to_timestamp_millis($event_time + 2000) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: VIPSA Event Details Around Clicked Time

title: VIPSA
